meta.title: HYROX event taxonomy and personalization rules
meta.purpose: Keep athlete profile, division standards, age groups, and experience-based defaults out of renderer code.

men: Open station loads: sled push 152 kg incl. sled, sled pull 103 kg incl. sled, farmers carry 2 x 24 kg, sandbag lunges 20 kg, wall balls 6 kg.
开放组动作重量：推雪橇 152 kg 含雪橇、拉雪橇 103 kg 含雪橇、农夫走 2 x 24 kg、沙袋弓步 20 kg、墙球 6 kg。
women: Open station loads: sled push 102 kg incl. sled, sled pull 78 kg incl. sled, farmers carry 2 x 16 kg, sandbag lunges 10 kg, wall balls 4 kg.
开放组动作重量：推雪橇 102 kg 含雪橇、拉雪橇 78 kg 含雪橇、农夫走 2 x 16 kg、沙袋弓步 10 kg、墙球 4 kg。
mixed: Open training should follow each athlete's registered sex/category loads.
开放组训练应按每位运动员实际报名性别/类别重量执行。
unknown: Open training uses scalable station loads until the athlete confirms registered sex/category.
未确认报名性别/类别前，开放组训练使用可缩放站点重量。

men: Pro station loads: sled push 202 kg incl. sled, sled pull 153 kg incl. sled, farmers carry 2 x 32 kg, sandbag lunges 30 kg, wall balls 9 kg.
Pro 组动作重量：推雪橇 202 kg 含雪橇、拉雪橇 153 kg 含雪橇、农夫走 2 x 32 kg、沙袋弓步 30 kg、墙球 9 kg。
women: Pro station loads: sled push 152 kg incl. sled, sled pull 103 kg incl. sled, farmers carry 2 x 24 kg, sandbag lunges 20 kg, wall balls 6 kg.
Pro 组动作重量：推雪橇 152 kg 含雪橇、拉雪橇 103 kg 含雪橇、农夫走 2 x 24 kg、沙袋弓步 20 kg、墙球 6 kg。
mixed: Pro training requires individual load confirmation; do not use mixed averages for race standards.
Pro 训练必须确认个人报名重量，不使用混合平均重量作为比赛标准。
unknown: Pro training requires confirmed registered category before race-load station work.
Pro 训练在进行比赛重量站点课前，必须确认实际报名类别。

men: Doubles planning should include shared station strategy, partner transitions, and each athlete's registered load rules.
双人组计划需要包含分工策略、搭档交接和每名运动员的报名重量规则。
women: Doubles planning should include shared station strategy, partner transitions, and each athlete's registered load rules.
双人组计划需要包含分工策略、搭档交接和每名运动员的报名重量规则。
mixed: Mixed doubles training should separate each partner's station loads and practice handoffs under fatigue.
混双训练应区分每位搭档的站点重量，并练习疲劳下交接。
unknown: Doubles training needs partner profile before precise station-load prescription.
双人组需要搭档画像后才能精确制定站点重量。

men: Relay planning should match each athlete to the station that best fits their current limiter.
接力组计划应按每名运动员当前短板分配最合适站点。
women: Relay planning should match each athlete to the station that best fits their current limiter.
接力组计划应按每名运动员当前短板分配最合适站点。
mixed: Relay planning should match station order, athlete handoff, and warm-up timing.
接力组计划应匹配站点顺序、队友交接和热身时间。
unknown: Relay training stays general until the athlete's assigned stations are known.
未确认接力站点前，接力训练保持通用准备。

coaching: Age-band rule: build technical standards before chasing adult race volume.
年龄段规则：先建立技术标准，再追求成人比赛训练量。
Age-band rule: normal progression is allowed when sleep, soreness, and split quality stay stable.
年龄段规则：睡眠、酸痛和分段质量稳定时，可按标准节奏进阶。
Age-band rule: add warm-up time and progress intensity only after tendon and joint response is calm.
年龄段规则：增加热身时间，只有肌腱和关节反应稳定后再提高强度。
Age-band rule: protect two recovery touchpoints weekly and substitute lower-impact work when joints are irritated.
年龄段规则：每周保留两个恢复节点；关节不适时替换为低冲击训练。
Newcomer rule: cap hard work at one main quality session this week.
新手规则：本周主要质量课最多一次。
Recreational rule: progress only one variable at a time: load, pace, or volume.
普通训练者规则：每次只推进一个变量：重量、配速或训练量。
Veteran rule: use benchmark splits to decide whether to add volume or preserve quality.
老鸟规则：用基准分段判断该增加训练量还是保护质量。
Elite rule: daily readiness and split quality override fixed volume.
精英规则：每日状态和分段质量优先于固定训练量。
